requirement_topic.en: Safety and Environmental Suitability — IEC 62109, MSB Conformity, Cyclone and Salt-Mist Derating
requirement_topic.zh: 安全与环境适用性——IEC 62109、MSB合格评定、气旋和盐雾降额
requirement_topic.zht: 安全與環境適用性——IEC 62109、MSB合格評定、氣旋和鹽霧降額

summary.en: PV inverter market access and project acceptance in Mauritius should be prepared around MSB conformity expectations and IEC-aligned safety evidence. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the core safety standards for power converters and PV inverters. Because Mauritius is a developed Indian-Ocean island market with high renewable-energy targets and coastal installations, project files should also address environmental suitability: tropical heat and humidity, cyclone wind exposure through mounting and enclosure choices, salt-mist/corrosion derating for coastal sites, ingress protection, and serviceability under CEB connection conditions.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯光伏逆变器市场准入和项目验收应围绕MSB合格评定预期及IEC对齐安全证据准备。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是功率变换器和光伏逆变器的核心安全标准。由于毛里求斯是印度洋发达岛国市场，且可再生能源目标较高、沿海安装较多，项目文件还应说明环境适用性：热带高温高湿、通过安装和外壳选择应对气旋风暴暴露、沿海场址盐雾/腐蚀降额、防护等级，以及在CEB接入条件下的可维护性。
summary.zht: 模里西斯光伏逆變器市場准入和項目驗收應圍繞MSB合格評定預期及IEC對齊安全證據準備。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是功率轉換器和光伏逆變器的核心安全標準。由於模里西斯是印度洋發達島國市場，且再生能源目標較高、沿海安裝較多，項目文件還應說明環境適用性：熱帶高溫高濕、通過安裝和外殼選擇應對氣旋風暴暴露、沿海場址鹽霧/腐蝕降額、防護等級，以及在CEB接入條件下的可維護性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) conformity and standards adoption framework
Mauritius renewable-energy policy context including the national target of 60% renewable energy by 2030
Project-specific coastal, cyclone, salt-mist, ingress-protection, and derating requirements

summary.en: China evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, factory quality-control files, CQC or CGC voluntary certificates, and CNAS laboratory reports. These can support a technical dossier but are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence or for Mauritius project-owner environmental suitability requirements. Chinese standard operation may not cover Mauritius coastal corrosion exposure or cyclone-related installation assumptions unless separately tested or documented.
summary.zh: 中国证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工厂质量控制文件、CQC或CGC自愿性证书，以及CNAS实验室报告。这些资料可支持技术档案，但不能自动替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，也不能自动替代毛里求斯项目业主的环境适用性要求。除非另行测试或记录，中国标准运行条件未必覆盖毛里求斯沿海腐蚀暴露或气旋相关安装假设。
summary.zht: 中國證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工廠品質控制文件、CQC或CGC自願性證書，以及CNAS實驗室報告。這些資料可支持技術檔案，但不能自動替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，也不能自動替代模里西斯項目業主的環境適用性要求。除非另行測試或記錄，中國標準運行條件未必覆蓋模里西斯沿海腐蝕暴露或氣旋相關安裝假設。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: A China-only safety dossier should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence, MSB conformity documentation where applicable, and environmental suitability records for Mauritius. For coastal projects, include salt-mist/corrosion class assumptions, enclosure ingress protection, thermal derating curves, surge protection coordination, installation clearances, and cyclone-resilient mounting interface information. Confirm whether the CEB project reviewer, EPC contractor, insurer, or project owner requires additional tropical or coastal test evidence before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：仅含中国安全证据的档案应补充IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据、适用时的MSB合格评定文件，以及毛里求斯环境适用性记录。沿海项目应包括盐雾/腐蚀等级假设、外壳防护等级、热降额曲线、浪涌保护配合、安装间距和抗气旋安装接口信息。出货前应确认CEB项目审查方、EPC承包商、保险方或项目业主是否要求额外热带或沿海测试证据。
gap.zht: 差距：僅含中國安全證據的檔案應補充IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據、適用時的MSB合格評定文件，以及模里西斯環境適用性記錄。沿海項目應包括鹽霧/腐蝕等級假設、外殼防護等級、熱降額曲線、突波保護配合、安裝間距和抗氣旋安裝介面資訊。出貨前應確認CEB項目審查方、EPC承包商、保險方或項目業主是否要求額外熱帶或沿海測試證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where MSB conformity, CEB technical review, EPC procurement, insurer, or project-owner requirements call for IEC 62109 and environmental suitability evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T and NB/T evidence may support China domestic conformity or voluntary certification but does not automatically satisfy Mauritius IEC and environmental project requirements

source.publisher: Ministry of Energy and Public Utilities (Mauritius)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China-only GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 safety evidence for Mauritius project acceptance. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 reports and a Mauritius environmental suitability file addressing coastal salt mist, cyclone exposure, humidity, thermal derating, ingress protection, and project-specific CEB or owner requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅依赖中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全证据来满足毛里求斯项目验收。应准备IEC 62109-1/-2报告，以及覆盖沿海盐雾、气旋暴露、湿度、热降额、防护等级和项目特定CEB或业主要求的毛里求斯环境适用性文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅依賴中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全證據來滿足模里西斯項目驗收。應準備IEC 62109-1/-2報告，以及覆蓋沿海鹽霧、氣旋暴露、濕度、熱降額、防護等級和項目特定CEB或業主要求的模里西斯環境適用性文件。
